mapper.sql: id, accountant_name, start_date, transfer_date, company_name, subject_name, tax_no, legal_person, establish_date, registered_capital, registered_address, bank_account, bank_name, brand_name, remark, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time
mapper.select:
select from biz_company_subject
and company_name like concat('%', #{companyName}, '%')
and subject_name like concat('%', #{subjectName}, '%')
and tax_no like concat('%', #{taxNo}, '%')
and legal_person like concat('%', #{legalPerson}, '%')
and brand_name = #{brandName}
and status = #{status}
order by id desc
mapper.insert: insert into biz_company_subject ( accountant_name, start_date, transfer_date, company_name, subject_name, tax_no, legal_person, establish_date, registered_capital, registered_address, bank_account, bank_name, brand_name, remark, status, create_by, create_time ) values ( #{accountantName}, #{startDate}, #{transferDate}, #{companyName}, #{subjectName}, #{taxNo}, #{legalPerson}, #{establishDate}, #{registeredCapital}, #{registeredAddress}, #{bankAccount}, #{bankName}, #{brandName}, #{remark}, #{status}, #{createBy}, now() )
mapper.select: select * from biz_company_subject where company_name = #{companyName} order by id desc limit 1
